'''''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] junior novel written by [[Patricia C. Wrede]], based on a story and screenplay by [[George Lucas]]. It adapts the film [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']], and it was first published in [[May]] [[2005]] by [[Scholastic]], prior to the film's release.<ref name="Amazon" /> The novel was collected in ''[[Star Wars: Collector's Edition]]'' ([[2005]]), ''[[Star Wars Boxed Set: Episodes I–VI]]'' ([[2007]]), and ''[[Star Wars: Prequel Trilogy]]'' ([[2014]]).

==Publisher's summary==
''A long time ago in a galaxy far, far, far away....''

''A vow is broken. A Jedi falls. A Sith Lord rises.''

''The Empire is born.''
